2. Hierarchy of Hell: Dante’s Inferno vs. Ars Goetia
Dante focuses on moral allegory (sins → punishments).
Ars Goetia is a practical demonology (demons as tools for magicians).
Diagnosis: Identify jinn type (violent whispers, nightmares).
Physical Acts: Blowing on water, using honey (Prophetic medicine).
Expulsion: Command jinn to leave in Allah’s name.
